title: How can I fill in 4 digit decimal in number column?
excerpt:
How can I fill in 4 digit decimal in number column, since number column limits only 3 digit decimal. 
Thanks

posts.author: Panita (Panita Kongchandee)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I fill in 4 digit decimal in number column, since number column limits only 3 digit decimal.
Thanks

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Panita

Unfortunately, only 3 decimal places are displayed. However, more than that are stored. You can create a formula column with a formula like this {Numbers}*100000 to see better what is stored.

Depending on the specific use, you could also use a text column instead.

Jim - The Monday Man
